title: Need to integrate Monday.com with an automated direct mail vendor

posts.author: UBS (Jim Lyles)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I was wondering if Monday.com has the ability to trigger events in other online platforms through it’s API, webhooks or some other method. If so, is there someone who can help me accomplish the following goal:

I have a database of prospects in Monday.com and I would like to establish a direct marketing drip campaign to them by utilizing an online automated direct mail vendor. I have narrowed down my search to 2 possible direct mail vendors; heypoplar.com (https://www.heypoplar.com/) and lob.com (https://www.lob.com/). Both platforms have API that allows triggered mailings of any quantity. Based on reading the Monday API documentation it appears that Monday’s API is just for triggering events within Monday and not in other applications. But I am strictly a user and have no programming or API experience so Monday’s capability is still a little cloudy for me. There is Zapier capability for both mail vendors with Monday but they don’t seem to have what I need. I am interested in hiring someone with knowledge of API, webhooks and zapier, and Monday.com’s capability in that regard. Any initial insight and guidance is greatly appreciated. If this seems possible, I would be interested in discussing it further and can provide a more detailed scope of work for the project. Thanks so much!

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: Jim, we are Zapier experts and have done a couple of projects with Lob. Beyond Zapier, APIs is our bread and butter. I’ll send you a PM

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @UBS and thanks for posting!

I work with CarbonWeb and we are a monday.com partner that specializes in custom development and advanced integrations. We have produced standalone Suites that can be consumed within the monday.com Marketplace, but also have been able to develop one of a kind solutions for our clients.

I would be interested in learning more about these platforms and seeing if my team can help. With the holidays coming up I am sure we can take a deep look at this in the New Year.

For now, feel free to grab some time with me here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you get this integration going, and have a happy holidays!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
